reviews.review_description:
Sorry, this gets a thumbs down for me as it just comes across like a cheap Outrun. Controls are good, but the presentation lacked as far as charector selection. Tracks in what I played were dull and, at times, crashes would happen for no good reason. As usual for the price, it's a nice game. However, I do feel there are a few things that need ironing out.
Oh, please get rid of that A.I. voice.

I just played a little while, and this is a very, very impressive game. It looks GREAT and the controls are solid. One of the best VR games so far. Only complaint is-- was that a tutorial?? I have little idea what my controls do (i.e. how to brake/accelerate). Steering is easy with the stick, but I mostly have no idea what I'm doing. I think I accelerate with the trigger, or... not sure. Still, this game is excellent
